institution.name: Cossatot Community College of the University of Arkansas

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cossatot Community College of the University of Arkansas rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cossatot Community College of the University of Arkansas rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cossatot Community College of the University of Arkansas fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (858 → 772).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cossatot Community College of the University of Arkansas rose 70% between 2007 and 2010 (13.2% → 22.4%).
